name: BSides Los Angeles 2026
description: LA's premier community security conference featuring talks, workshops, and networking opportunities for security professionals of all levels.

name: OWASP SoCal Monthly
description: Monthly gathering of the OWASP Southern California chapter covering web application security topics and best practices.

name: SecureWorld Atlanta
description: Regional cybersecurity conference connecting security professionals with industry leaders through educational sessions and networking.

name: Cloud Security Workshop
description: Hands-on virtual workshop covering AWS, Azure, and GCP security fundamentals with practical exercises and real-world scenarios.

name: ISSA NYC Chapter Meeting
description: Monthly chapter meeting featuring guest speakers, networking, and discussion of current cybersecurity trends and challenges.

name: Midwest Cyber CTF
description: Capture the flag competition open to all skill levels with categories including web exploitation, cryptography, reverse engineering, and forensics.

name: Zero Trust Architecture Webinar
description: Expert-led webinar exploring zero trust principles, implementation strategies, and real-world case studies from enterprise deployments.

name: BSides Austin
description: Two-day community-driven security conference in Austin featuring technical talks, villages, and a strong focus on hands-on learning.
